title: Elfranso Cotton Kitchen Tea Towels - Pack of 5, Absorbent, 70 x 50 cm (Grey)
features: Immense Quality: Towels made from 100% Cotton. Giving you the guaranteed satisfaction of having a perfectly durable cloth. Serves as the perfect alternative to tissues and paper towels.
High-Quality and Versatile: This set includes five durable tea towels, each featuring a unique design with white and grey stripes, perfect for various kitchen tasks.
Size: Each dish towel measures 70 x 50 cm. Large Enough Dish Towels like these ensure that we can get our everyday cleaning chores done in a pinch even with just one.
Imported: Made from the finest cotton in Pakistan. These cotton tea towels are made for durability to serve for a long-lasting experience – not to mention lint free.
Instructions: Recommended to Machine Wash at Low Temperatures. Avoid High temperatures to prevent the tea towels from being damaged.
description: Product Description Nothing Good like from cleaning your hands to cleaning the kitchen or even your home. These Tea towels are the ones for you. Elfranso’s Tea towels do one hell of a job. Made from the finest cotton making it super easy to wash and super durable to give your home have a long lasting sparkly touch to it. Ranging from using it as a hot pad to even serve as decorations from the table with our pack of 5 Durable and Lint Free: Made from pure cotton material making it efficient at absorption. Purpose: The perfect solution for your kitchen to dry glasses, dishes, utensils, and. Also useful for cleaning windows or even serves as a good picnic hamper. MULTIPURPOSE TOWEL: Whether you’re drying dishes, dusting or cleaning your home, these absorbent towels are the perfect choice for an array of uses. They don’t leave behind any dirt, lint or grime which makes them a great choice for every kind of surface. HIGH QUALITY: Our prime focus is on providing premium products that are aesthetically refreshing, featuring eye-catching colors, and are durable, at the same time. We also firmly believe in continuous improvement in the quality and diversification of our product range based upon your feedback and suggestions. Specifications: Color: White and Grey Stripe Patterns Size: 70 x 50 cm Pack of 5. Material: Pure Cotton Made in Pakistan
